title: National Prosecutions Service (Appointment of Public Prosecutors) Notice, 2023
title_en: National Prosecutions Service (Appointment of Public Prosecutors) Notice, 2023

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the National Prosecutions Service (Appointment of Public Prosecutors) Notice, 2023.

provisions.title: Appointment of public prosecutors
provisions.content: The persons whose names appear in the Schedule to this Notice are hereby appointed to be public prosecutors for purposes of prosecuting criminal cases on behalf of the Director of Public Prosecutions.

provisions.title: Validity
provisions.content: (1) A prosecutor appointed under paragraph 2 shall serve for a period of five years from the date of publication of this Notice. (2) Notwithstanding the generality of subparagraph (1), a public prosecutor appointed under this Notice may serve for a period of less than five years where such person’s employment in the public service is determined or when the appointment is revoked or suspended by the Director of Public Prosecutions. Schedule (Made under paragraph 2) S/n Name 1. PF. 21127 A/Insp. Witness Bura 2. G. 5229 Cpl Renifrid William 3. A/Insp. Mweta Samweli 4. Hamis Y.
